checks.name: App wraps routes in AppShell
checks.detail: App shell must remain mounted around route tree.

checks.name: AppShell derives auth from context
checks.detail: Navbar visibility must not infer auth from storage.

checks.name: AppShell keeps shell visible during checking/booting
checks.detail: Transient hydration must not collapse shell.

checks.name: Hydration marks auth phase boundaries
checks.detail: Hydration lifecycle must be explicit and deterministic.

checks.name: Runtime pilot shell persistence
checks.detail: post_login: path=/dashboard, logoutVisible=true, navCount=17, tokenExists=true, userExists=true, loginBounceWithToken=false, hiddenNavbarWithToken=false

checks.name: Runtime CTRL+F5 shell persistence
checks.detail: ctrlf5_1: path=/dashboard, logoutVisible=true, navCount=17, tokenExists=true, userExists=true, loginBounceWithToken=false, hiddenNavbarWithToken=false | ctrlf5_2: path=/dashboard, logoutVisible=true, navCount=17, tokenExists=true, userExists=true, loginBounceWithToken=false, hiddenNavbarWithToken=false | ctrlf5_3: path=/dashboard, logoutVisible=true, navCount=17, tokenExists=true, userExists=true, loginBounceWithToken=false, hiddenNavbarWithToken=false

checks.name: AppShell remains mounted with persistent session
